name: aidlc-ux
description: Award-tier UI/UX pod for the AIDLC pipeline: a UX-narrative writer, an Awwwards inspiration researcher, a design-system owner (the uniformity anchor), a motion/interaction specialist, and a strict unbiased jury that renders the UI and gates on a ≥9/10 Awwwards-style score. Works on new and existing projects, at page or whole-app scope, and honors supplied brand references (logo, colors, fonts).
